message:
🐛 fix(test): align UpdateIndicator mock with real hook shape (#8290) (#8295)

useVersionCheck computes hasUpdate as a boolean via useMemo (see
useVersionCheck.tsx:712), but the mock returned null. The early-return
path `if (!hasUpdate)` happens to short-circuit for both null and false,
so the assertion still passed — but relying on null-coercion means the
mock no longer reflects what the component sees in real usage, and a
future change that compares `hasUpdate === false` would silently drift
from the mock.

Change the mock to `hasUpdate: false` (matching the hook's real boolean
return) and update the test comment to match.

Addresses #8290 (Copilot review on merged #8288).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
